---
id: get-property-by-id
title: "Get property details by ID"
description: "Get full details for a specific property including title, description, location, amenities, pricing information, and images. Use this after finding a property via search to display its full listing page."
sidebar_label: "Get property details by ID"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/booking-brain-developer-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get property details by ID"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/developer/properties/{id}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Get full details for a specific property including title, description, location, amenities, pricing information, and images. Use this after finding a property via search to display its full listing page.
